name: feynman
description: Auto-inject ASCII diagram rules into Claude Code prompts. Structure in your response gets a diagram without the developer asking.

interface.shortDescription: Draw ASCII diagrams when structure appears.
interface.longDescription: feynman is a hook-based plugin that injects concise ASCII diagram rules on every prompt — flows, hierarchies, comparisons, priorities, and status summaries render as readable diagrams. Includes a built-in linter (13 rules) and autofix engine. Zero npm dependencies; pure CommonJS.
defaultPrompt: Use feynman diagrams for structured answers.
Compare these options with ASCII columns.
